description: Italian mafia-type criminal organization based in Apulia, primarily active in Salento. Founded in the early 1980s as a response to Camorra expansion, with ties to the 'Ndrangheta. Reached its peak in the late 1980s and early 1990s, then weakened by state intervention. In the 2010s, it adopted a strategy of infiltration into the business sector.

country_links.evidence_quote: Francesco Prudentino (di Ostuni, capo della SCU in Montenegro), arrestato nel 2000 a Salonicco (Grecia) dopo sei anni di latitanza.
country_links.context: A SCU leader was arrested in Greece after years on the run.

country_links.evidence_quote: Francesco Prudentino (di Ostuni, capo della SCU in Montenegro), arrestato nel 2000 a Salonicco (Grecia) dopo sei anni di latitanza.
country_links.context: The SCU has a member based in Montenegro, where he was arrested.
